div.p:
target = 0x5100 (ptr to find)
blocks_before = 0
current_chunk = pool->chunks

target = 0x5100
chunk_start = 0x5000 (Chunk 1)
block_size = 64 bytes
offset = 0x5100 - 0x5000 = 0x100 = 256
256 % 64 = 0 ✓ (aligned)
local_index = 256 / 64 = 4

global_index = blocks_before + local_index
global_index = 100 + 4 = 104
Block 104 is in Chunk 1, local position 4

target < chunk_start for all chunks
→ Pointer not from this pool

target >= chunk_end for all chunks
→ Pointer not from this pool

offset % block_size != 0
→ Pointer to middle of block, not start

O(chunk_count) — Linear scan of chunk list
Must traverse until found or exhausted.
For fixed-size growth:
chunks = total_blocks / blocks_per_chunk

ol.li: Sorted chunk array — Binary search O(log n)
Block header — Store chunk ID per block

div.p:
memory: 0x5000
num_blocks: 100
Range: [0x5000, 0x9000)
